personalisation.template_context: HumTech offers a done-for-you AI Revenue Engine for conveyancing and property law firms — AI booking bot that converts property enquiries into instructed matters, speed-to-lead automation so no enquiry goes cold (critical in conveyancing where the first firm to respond wins the instruction), sales process improvement, and full ad management. They only get paid when revenue goes up.

sector_hints.reference_outcome: converting property enquiries into instructed matters
